title: Update README and sprint state docs to reflect current code state
description:
From deep_code_audit finding 5 (95% confidence): README still says v0.35.0 / Sprint 35 complete and 501+ tests. Current state is Sprint 49, 722 tests. Stale operator docs make it harder to trust the repo and easier to duplicate planning work.

Fix: Update README version string, sprint state, and test counts to match current code. Keep handoff docs and roadmap in sync whenever a sprint closes.

Source: deep_code_audit (Finding 5)
